summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kaelra personal AI operator app (11 screens). Backend already 100% passing. Found 1 critical bug in Talk page (race condition crash) and 1 mobile UX issue (More button blocked by badge overlay).

backend_issues.note: Backend already tested and passing 100% (59/59 tests) per main agent

critical_bugs.issue: Race condition: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading content)' when clicking 'New Chat' button while streaming response is in progress
critical_bugs.root_cause: When newChat() clears messages array, ongoing streaming callback tries to access copy[copy.length - 1].content on empty array, causing undefined error
critical_bugs.impact: Crashes React component, shows red error screen, breaks Talk page functionality
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Send a message in Talk page 2. While Kaelra is streaming response, click 'New Chat' button 3. Error appears immediately
critical_bugs.suggested_fix: Add streaming state check in newChat() to cancel ongoing streams, OR add null check in streaming callback before accessing message.content

ui_bugs.issue: More button not clickable on mobile - 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepts pointer events
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access secondary navigation (Routines, Connected Accounts, Devices, Settings) on mobile
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Adjust z-index of Emergent badge or add pointer-events: none to badge container

passed_tests: ✅ Auth page: Demo login button works, sign-in/sign-up tabs render correctly
✅ Today dashboard: Daily briefing card loads with LLM-generated greeting mentioning Hetul
✅ Today dashboard: All 8 cards present (Schedule, Emails, Commute, Goals, Reminders, News, Files, Devices)
✅ Today dashboard: Action Queue preview shows pending actions with Approve/Reject buttons
✅ Command bar: Accepts input and navigates to Talk page with initial message
✅ Talk page: Message streaming works, Kaelra responds with LLM-generated content
✅ Talk page: Voice button shows 'coming soon' toast (intentional UI-only feature)
✅ Action Queue: Filter tabs work (Pending, Approved, Snoozed, Rejected, All)
✅ Action Queue: Action items display with Approve, Reject, Edit, Snooze buttons
✅ Memory page: Loads with add memory button
✅ Files page: Loads with upload button
✅ Routines page: Loads successfully
✅ Connected Accounts: Shows 8 integration cards with status badges
✅ Devices page: Shows synced devices list with voice/alerts status
✅ Settings page: Profile inputs, tone selector, preference toggles, approval rules all present
✅ Navigation: Desktop sidebar navigation works across all 11 screens
✅ Navigation: Action Queue badge shows pending count (34 actions)
✅ Responsive: Mobile viewport shows bottom tab bar with 4 tabs (Today, Talk, Action, Memory)
✅ UI/UX: Dark glassmorphism design, breathing Kaelra orb, warm color scheme all working
✅ Session management: JWT token persists across page navigation within single session

success_percentage.frontend_critical_bugs: 1 critical bug found (Talk page race condition)

action_item_for_main_agent.priority_1_critical: Fix Talk.js race condition bug (line 69-73): Add streaming cancellation in newChat() function OR add null check in streaming callback before accessing message.content. This crashes the entire Talk page.
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_2_high: Fix mobile More button: Emergent badge is blocking pointer events. Adjust z-index or add pointer-events: none to badge.
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_3_testing: After fixes, re-test Talk page: 1) Send message 2) Click New Chat during streaming 3) Verify no crash. Test mobile More button click.

detailed_notes.llm_integration: Claude Sonnet 4.5 working correctly for briefing generation and chat streaming. Responses are contextual and warm-toned.
detailed_notes.data_testid_coverage: Excellent - all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
detailed_notes.ui_polish: Professional dark glassmorphism design with breathing orb animation, warm color palette, smooth transitions
detailed_notes.demo_data: Rich demo account (Hetul) with realistic schedule, emails, goals, actions, devices - excellent for testing
detailed_notes.mocked_integrations: Calendar/Gmail/Drive/Maps/News connectors return realistic demo data as intended
detailed_notes.voice_feature: Voice button correctly shows 'coming soon' toast - intentional UI-only implementation
detailed_notes.session_issue_resolved: Initial session management concern was due to testing approach - works correctly when maintaining single browser session
